title: [YTP] The Sus Zone Episode 1: The Prodigal Pingas (Part 2)
description:
This is the second part of the misadventures of The Prodigal Pingas and his butt-buddy, Harrington. In this episode, Harrington exhibits strange, alien-like behavior and emits awful, loud noises, while simultaneously flashing bright colors. The Prodigal Pingas remains firm in his belief that YTP does not exist. 

Source:
The Twilight Zone Season 1, Episode 11 "And When the Sky was Opened" (1959)

Software/Programs used:
*Sony Vegas Pro 9.0
*Sony Vegas Pro 12.0 + Sapphire plugins
*Paint.net
*MS paint
